title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
